case_title: OPORTUN INC. DBA PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. WISTONG DINARTE OBANDO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. DBA PROGRESO FINANCIERO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT/COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. DBA PROGRESO FINANCIERO AS TO DEFENDANT OBANDO, WISTONG DINARTE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. DBA PROGRESO FINANCIERO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OBANDO, WISTONG DINARTE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,492.04 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. DBA PROGRESO FINANCIERO AS TO DEFENDANT OBANDO, WISTONG DINARTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
